test-case.q: how to listen to a recording of a lesson?
is there a video recording of the lesson?
Is there video and audio recording of lessons on the platform?
What should I do if I taught a lesson not on the platform? Should I record it myself?
Tell me, please, where can I watch the recording of the lessons?
I wanted to listen to the recording of the lesson from March 14, I myself don’t see it on the platform now.
Please tell me where I need to post a recording of the lesson I completed?
and if a student does not come to a lesson, a recording of the lesson is saved in the student’s personal account?
We taught a lesson outside the platform, but forgot to record the lesson. Is there any other way to confirm that the lesson was taught?
Can you send me a recording of a lesson with a student? I want to listen to the last lesson.
How long are lesson recordings stored on the platform?
If we teach a lesson on Skype, do I need to record the lesson?
I see that the student previously studied on the platform, but I cannot listen to the recording of the lesson from 15.10. Can you send it to me?
